response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 10+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput services (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handled millions of HTTP req/sec), plus AI-agent and MCP tooling exposure at current role. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flighting, A/B testing frameworks, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — all central to this IC6 Growth/Experimentation role. Title trajectory (Senior/Staff) and breadth suggest strong fundamentals, but Principal-level scope of cross-team platform ownership and growth-systems leadership is not evidenced. Worth a screening call to probe scale, leadership scope, and any unstated experimentation work.
strengths: High-scale production experience (millions of req/sec at Sociomantic; millions of mailings/yr at Pinepoint)
Strong polyglot fundamentals (TypeScript, Node, D, C/C++, Java) plus recent AI-agent/MCP tooling work
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, courses, OSS projects, and mentoring (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based)
concerns: No evidence of experimentation, A/B testing, feature-flag, or growth-platform work — the core of the role
Limited signal on data science / statistical analysis / metrics-platform building
Title/scope appears Senior-to-Staff; Principal-level cross-org platform ownership and stakeholder influence not clearly demonstrated
